asset.title: Proposals Wall Review
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview successfully demonstrates transitioning from a spreadsheet view to a diligence wall review with agent-generated proposals. The UI is highly detailed and consistent with the NodeRoom product story.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition from spreadsheet collaboration to a proposals wall review, though the transition is very rapid.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the before state (spreadsheet), action (running collaboration), and result (proposals wall with trace updates).

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-mode UI is highly detailed and structured, though the density of information is quite high.

consistency.evidence: Integrates spreadsheets, chat, private agents, and room traces seamlessly into a single view.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Looks like an authentic product capture with realistic financial data and agent logs.

legibility.evidence: Text is readable at standard resolutions, though some smaller labels require zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to financial analysts and operations teams managing automated reconciliation.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts UI state changes and trace logs without artificial overlays.

observedEvidence: Diligence wall view with sticky notes/cards
Room trace updates showing agent proposals

defects.observed: The transition from the spreadsheet view to the Diligence Wall is abrupt and may disorient viewers.
defects.fix: Add a brief fade transition or slow down the frame rate during the view switch.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom transition from a collaborative spreadsheet to a Diligence Wall where agents propose and track variance footnotes.
